creator: cowbert@gmail.com
text:
I would like to take maintainership of the databases/freetds port, and update it to 0.82.1

Request testing by current users of this port. Fork to -devel if necessary.

Currently tested with WITH_MSDBLIB against MS SQL 2000 and MS SQL 2005 and databases/unixODBC.

Fix: See unified diff below for patch information.

Request testing.

Patch attached with submission follows:
